description:
I'm setting up a monitoring infrastructure and need to add an external alerting library as a git submodule to my project.

I have an existing git repository at `/home/user/monitoring-project`. I need you to add the prometheus alertmanager repository (https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager.git) as a submodule in the `external/alertmanager` directory within my project.

After adding the submodule, please create a verification log file at `/home/user/monitoring-project/submodule-setup.log` that contains the following information in this exact format:

```
SUBMODULE_PATH: external/alertmanager
SUBMODULE_URL: <the actual URL of the submodule>
SUBMODULE_STATUS: <output of git submodule status for this submodule>
SETUP_COMPLETE: true
```

Each line should start exactly with the label shown (like `SUBMODULE_PATH:`) followed by a space and then the value. The `SUBMODULE_URL` should be extracted from the git configuration, and `SUBMODULE_STATUS` should show the commit hash and path as reported by git.

Make sure the submodule is properly initialized and the `.gitmodules` file is created in the repository root.
truth:
Pre-existing setup required:
- Directory `/home/user/monitoring-project` must exist and be initialized as a git repository
- The user must have write permissions to this directory
- Git must be installed and configured

Commands to set up the environment before the task:
```bash
mkdir -p /home/user/monitoring-project
cd /home/user/monitoring-project
git init
git config user.email "test@example.com"
git config user.name "Test User"
touch README.md
git add README.md
git commit -m "Initial commit"
```

Expected final state after task completion:

1. File `/home/user/monitoring-project/.gitmodules` should exist and contain:
   - A section for the alertmanager submodule
   - path = external/alertmanager
   - url = https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager.git

2. Directory `/home/user/monitoring-project/external/alertmanager` should exist and contain the cloned alertmanager repository

3. File `/home/user/monitoring-project/submodule-setup.log` should exist with format:
   - Line 1: `SUBMODULE_PATH: external/alertmanager`
   - Line 2: `SUBMODULE_URL: https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager.git`
   - Line 3: `SUBMODULE_STATUS: ` followed by a commit hash (40 hex characters) and path (format like ` abc123... external/alertmanager` with possible prefix character like `-` or space)
   - Line 4: `SETUP_COMPLETE: true`

4. Running `git submodule status` in `/home/user/monitoring-project` should show the alertmanager submodule

Verification checks:
- `.gitmodules` file exists and contains correct submodule configuration
- `external/alertmanager/.git` exists (or `.git` file pointing to gitdir)
- `submodule-setup.log` exists with all 4 required lines
- SUBMODULE_PATH line equals "external/alertmanager"
- SUBMODULE_URL line equals "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager.git"
- SUBMODULE_STATUS line contains a 40-character hex commit hash
- SETUP_COMPLETE line equals "true"
